issue_title: fix: make internal tool calls subtle in assistant chat
issue_body_preview:
# User description
## Summary
- Internal/thinking tool calls (Search Inbox, Read Email) now render as subtle muted text instead of bordered cards, reducing visual noise in the chat
- New `SubtleToolCollapsible` component for tools users don't typically need to inspect — small text with a chevron, ex
test_description_zh: 在助手聊天界面中触发包含内部工具调用（如 Search Inbox、Read Email）的对话，观察这些内部工具调用的渲染样式
expected_result_zh: 内部/思考类工具调用（如 Search Inbox、Read Email）应以低调的灰色小字文本呈现，而非带边框的卡片样式；点击展开箭头（chevron）可以展开查看详情，整体视觉噪音应较低，不会抢占用户对主要对话内容的注意力
